top_patterns.description: Open with personal note or activity, often ending with a prompt or hashtag.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal statement + [context or activity] + [call to action or hashtag]
example_quotes: Join us and lose your shoes today. #withoutshoes
Thanks for supporting One Day Without Shoes 2014!

top_patterns.description: Express thanks or recognition, often tagging others or referencing partnerships.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: common in event or partnership posts
example_quotes: Thank you @atticaofficial for the amazing window and partnership here in Greece.
Thanks for supporting our movement this week!

top_patterns.description: Share a quote or personal insight, often with minimal context.
example_quotes: Jean vanier quote just found in my wallet. Great reminder on what is freedom.
Aren't moms awesome? Throw back to a 2009 Giving Trip.
Had a blast at first TOMS Roasting Co launch party in Amsterdam.
Getting rid of my @toms tan in prep for #odws on April 29th.
Join us and lose your shoes today. #withoutshoes
Take off your shoes and join us on Tuesday 4/29.
Thank you @atticaofficial for the amazing window and partnership here in Greece.
Thanks for supporting our movement this week!

bridge_phrases: and I am so proud of her
great reminder on what is freedom
such a treat to spend time with
language_habits.line_break_style: mostly continuous, occasional line breaks for emphasis

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds connection and trust with audience
example_quotes: In Paris, the journal as my only companion.

voice_tells.tell: Call to action or community involvement
example_quotes: Join us and lose your shoes today. #withoutshoes
Take off your shoes and join us on Tuesday 4/29.

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or reflection
Generic motivational quotes without personal touch
Overuse of promotional language without authenticity

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, community-focused, action-oriented tone with emphasis on gratitude and participation.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action, increased use of hashtags, concise sentences, less abstract reflection.
